title: PRESCHOOL FOR ALL - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY PRESCHOOL FOR ALL PRESCHOOL FOR ALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects families to culturally-responsive, inclusive preschool experiences. Website Eligibility: Children must be 3 or 4 years old on or before September 1 of the preschool year, and have a parent or legal guardian living in Multnomah County There are no income eligibility requirements. Children who currently have the least access to high-quality early learning experiences are prioritized in the outreach and application processes. Hours: Applications: Currently accepting applications until all slots are filled Preschool Programs: Hours vary by site Email (503) 988-7818 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Application (503) 988-7818 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for help or questions, or visit the website for more information and to apply. Families who speak languages other than English or lack internet access should contact a Family Navigator site for assistance. The following organizations, listed under “Family Navigator” on the website, can help with applications: Black Parent Initiative, Immigrant and Refugee Community Organization (IRCO), Latino Network, and Native American Youth and Family Center (NAYA). FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Vietnamese. Arabic, Cantonese, Dari, Karen, Nepalese, Mandarin, Somali interpretation by arrangement. AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Preschool Age Children Preschool Referral Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
